channel.title: Htb-Easy on J. LeGrange
channel.description: Recent content in Htb-Easy on J. LeGrange

item.title: HacktheBox: CCTV
item.description: CCTV is an easy-difficulty box on HacktheBox dealing with a misconfiguration paired with a SQL injection for a fictitious CCTV camera company, followed by a public CVE on an internally-hosted app.

item.title: HacktheBox: WingData
item.description: WingData is an easy-difficulty box on HacktheBox dealing with two CVEs that have public proof-of-concept code written for them.
